name: STG · OPS · Webhook → Operator Escalation to Human Admin · ANS
description: OPS | Called when operator fails 3× or user requests human. Creates support ticket in Supabase, alerts Slack admin channel, emails user confirmation. Returns {ticket_id, status: escalated}. OWNER: Ansh | p1:high | ENV: STG

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.body.user_id, session_id: $json.body.session_id || null, issue_summary: $json.body.issue_summary || 'No summary provided', status: 'open', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ticket_id: $('Code - Build Notification Payloads').first().json.ticket_id, status: 'escalated', user_email: $('Code - Build Notification Payloads').first().json.user_email, message: 'A human is reviewing your request and will respond within 24 hours.' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_name: 'STG · OPS · Webhook → Operator Escalation to Human Admin · ANS', error_message: $json.error.message, error_node: $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted, execution_id: $execution.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
